case_title: NCCS INC. DBA NORTH COAST COLLECTION SERVICE VS. TONI BILLUPS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NCCS INC.
